user.title: Configure Stock Analysis Project
user.description: Enter your Stock Analysis Project instance details

data_description.base_url: The URL of your Stock Analysis Project instance
data_description.api_key: Your Stock Analysis Project API key for authentication
data_description.verify_ssl: Disable this if you're using corporate proxies like Zscaler that intercept SSL certificates
data_description.show_portfolio_totals: Create the portfolio-wide total sensors (cost, value, gain, dividends, TWR).
data_description.show_accounts: Create a separate sensor set (cash balance, gains, P&L, dividends, MWRR) for each Trading account.
data_description.show_holdings: Create a Market Value sensor plus Low/High Limit number entities for each holding, in each Trading account.
data_description.show_other_accounts: Create a sensor for each Pension/House account, on a shared "Other Accounts" device.
data_description.show_market_health: Create 7 sensors on a shared "Market Health" device: Market Regime, US/UK Market Classification, US 10Y Treasury, UK 10Y Gilt, US Treasury Auction Demand, and the Fear & Greed Index.
data_description.skip_refresh_when_markets_closed: Reduce polling further by reusing the last-known portfolio/account/holdings values while both UK and US markets are closed, instead of re-fetching every interval. Off by default: the backend already skips any live-price work on its own when markets are closed, so leaving this off just keeps every poll current with anything the backend updates overnight (e.g. the nightly snapshot). Other Accounts is never skipped this way.
data_description.update_interval: How often to update portfolio data (in minutes, min: 1, max: 1440)

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Stock Analysis Project
reconfigure.description: Update your Stock Analysis Project configuration

data_description.base_url: The URL of your Stock Analysis Project instance
data_description.api_key: Your Stock Analysis Project API key for authentication
data_description.verify_ssl: Disable this if you're using corporate proxies like Zscaler that intercept SSL certificates
data_description.show_portfolio_totals: Create the portfolio-wide total sensors (cost, value, gain, dividends, TWR).
data_description.show_accounts: Create a separate sensor set (cash balance, gains, P&L, dividends, MWRR) for each Trading account.

data_description.show_market_health: Create 7 sensors on a shared "Market Health" device: Market Regime, US/UK Market Classification, US 10Y Treasury, UK 10Y Gilt, US Treasury Auction Demand, and the Fear & Greed Index.
data_description.skip_refresh_when_markets_closed: Reduce polling further by reusing the last-known portfolio/account/holdings values while both UK and US markets are closed, instead of re-fetching every interval. Off by default: the backend already skips any live-price work on its own when markets are closed, so leaving this off just keeps every poll current with anything the backend updates overnight (e.g. the nightly snapshot). Other Accounts is never skipped this way.
data_description.update_interval: How often to update portfolio data (in minutes, min: 1, max: 1440)

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to Stock Analysis Project
error.auth_failed: Authentication failed. Please check your API key.
error.invalid_url: Base URL must start with http:// or https://

abort.already_configured: Stock Analysis Project instance is already configured
